creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Quick update.  After re-examining the logs from last week's build, I noticed that the lang/python3 port *did* in fact get installed, and failed to register as it was installed as a dependency (correctly) because FORCE_PKG_REGISTER was not set.

So behaviorally something did change in the right direction.  I am testing another patch now to reduce the changes previously made, but at least some of the previous changes were correct to some point.  I should have this fixed this afternoon and ready for this week's snapshot builds.
